title: Deployment & MLOps Review: Architecture Design Discussion
content:
### Day 215: Deployment & MLOps Review: Architecture Design Discussion

Deployment gets models from notebooks into the real world. MLOps makes ML systems reliable and maintainable in production.

**Key Concepts:**
- **Deployment & MLOps Review:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.
- **Architecture Design Discussion:** Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.

**Today's Focus:**
- Study each concept with hands-on practice
- Write working code examples
- Connect to real-world applications
- Think about how this would be tested in an interview

What interview questions could be asked about Deployment & MLOps Review?
keyTakeaways: Deployment & MLOps Review: Study this concept deeply — learn the syntax, see real-world examples, and practice writing code for it.
